title: A Psalm of the sons of Korah. A song.

verses.1: He has founded His city on the holy mountains.
verses.2: The LORD loves the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.
verses.3: Glorious things are ascribed to you, O city of God. Selah
verses.4: “I will mention Rahab and Babylon among those who know Me—along with Philistia, Tyre, and Cush—when I say, ‘This one was born in Zion.’”
verses.5: And it will be said of Zion: “This one and that one were born in her, and the Most High Himself will establish her.”
verses.6: The LORD will record in the register of the peoples: “This one was born in Zion.” Selah
verses.7: Singers and pipers will proclaim, “All my springs of joy are in You.”

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
